results.requirement_text: The system shall allow a user to create a new customer record with name, email, and phone number.

test_cases.title: Create new customer record with valid data
test_cases.objective: Verify that the system allows creation of a new customer record when provided with a valid name, email, and phone number.
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.

steps.action: Provide a valid name, email, and phone number and submit the request to create a customer record.
steps.expected_result: The system creates a new customer record with the provided name, email, and phone number.

test_cases.expected_result: A new customer record is created with the provided name, email, and phone number.
assumptions: Prerequisites for creating a customer record are configured.

traceability.coverage_item: Create a new customer record with valid name, email, and phone number

source_basis: allow a user to create a new customer record with name, email, and phone number

plans.requirement_text: The system shall allow a user to create a new customer record with name, email, and phone number.

coverage_items.coverage_item: Create a new customer record with valid name, email, and phone number
coverage_items.rationale: Verifies that the system supports the core functionality of creating a customer record as specified.
source_basis: allow a user to create a new customer record with name, email, and phone number

results.requirement_text: The system shall display a list of active projects sorted by most recently updated first.

test_cases.title: Verify only active projects are displayed
test_cases.objective: Confirm that the displayed project list contains exclusively active projects.
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.

steps.action: Observe the list of projects presented by the system.
steps.expected_result: The list includes only projects that are currently active.

test_cases.expected_result: Only active projects appear in the displayed list.
assumptions: The system has at least one active project available for display.
source_basis: display a list of active projects

test_cases.title: Verify projects are sorted by most recently updated first
test_cases.objective: Confirm that the displayed project list is ordered with the most recently updated project first.
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.

steps.action: Observe the ordering of projects in the displayed list.
steps.expected_result: Projects appear in descending order of their last update timestamp, with the most recent first.

test_cases.expected_result: The project list is sorted by most recently updated first.
assumptions: There exist multiple active projects with distinct last‑update timestamps.

traceability.coverage_item: Projects sorted by most recently updated first

source_basis: sorted by most recently updated first

warnings: Reviewer unavailable because Groq-only provider hit a rate limit

plans.requirement_text: The system shall display a list of active projects sorted by most recently updated first.

coverage_items.rationale: Verifies that the list excludes inactive projects as required.
source_basis: display a list of active projects

coverage_items.coverage_item: Projects sorted by most recently updated first
coverage_items.rationale: Ensures the displayed list respects the required sort order.
source_basis: sorted by most recently updated first

results.requirement_text: The system shall let a user update the status of a task from open to completed.

test_cases.title: Update task status from open to completed
test_cases.objective: Verify that a user can change a task status from open to completed.
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.

steps.action: Update the task status from open to completed.
steps.expected_result: The task status is changed to completed.

test_cases.expected_result: Task status is updated to completed.
assumptions: Assume that a task currently in 'open' status exists and the user has the ability to modify its status.

traceability.coverage_item: Update task status from open to completed

source_basis: update the status of a task from open to completed

plans.requirement_text: The system shall let a user update the status of a task from open to completed.

coverage_items.coverage_item: Update task status from open to completed
coverage_items.rationale: Verify that a user can change a task's status as specified
source_basis: update the status of a task from open to completed

results.requirement_text: The system shall allow a user to search orders by order number.

test_cases.title: Search orders by a valid order number returns the matching order record
test_cases.objective: Verify that searching with a valid order number returns the correct order record.
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.

steps.action: Perform a search for an order using a valid order number.
steps.expected_result: The system returns the matching order record.

test_cases.expected_result: The system returns the matching order record.
assumptions: Assume that the system is configured and accessible for searching orders.

traceability.coverage_item: Search orders by a valid order number returns the matching order record

coverage_items.coverage_item: Search orders by a valid order number returns the matching order record
coverage_items.rationale: Verifies the core functionality described in the requirement

results.requirement_text: The system shall allow a manager to assign an employee to a department.

test_cases.title: Manager assigns an employee to a department
test_cases.objective: Verify that a manager can assign an employee to a department
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.

steps.action: Execute the assignment of an employee to a department as a manager
steps.expected_result: The employee becomes associated with the specified department

test_cases.expected_result: The employee is successfully assigned to the department
assumptions: The employee and department records exist in the system

traceability.coverage_item: Manager can assign an employee to a department

source_basis: allow a manager to assign an employee to a department

assumptions: The employee and department records exist in the system
